scripts.build: turbo run build && pnpm --dir packages/peak-reality/dashboard build && pnpm --dir packages/peak-reality/peak-platform build
scripts.lint: turbo run lint && pnpm --dir packages/peak-reality/dashboard lint && pnpm --dir packages/peak-reality/peak-platform lint
scripts.typecheck: turbo run typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/omniaudit type-check && pnpm --dir packages/peak-reality/dashboard typecheck
scripts.test: turbo run test && pnpm --dir packages/peak-reality/peak-platform test && pnpm --dir packages/peak-reality/vscode-extension test
scripts.test:e2e: turbo run test:e2e && pnpm --dir packages/omniaudit/dashboard-next test:e2e
scripts.clean: turbo run clean && pnpm --dir packages/omniaudit clean
scripts.claw: sh -c '[ -x packages/claw-runtime/target/release/claw ] || (cd packages/claw-runtime && cargo build --release); exec packages/claw-runtime/target/release/claw "$@"' --
